archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast / Tech Startup Minimalist (E1 System)
design_philosophy: A modern, YC-style early-stage startup aesthetic. The design relies heavily on deep navy/black tones, extreme minimalism, generous whitespace, and subtle blue/white glowing accents. Stock photos are prohibited; visual interest must come from CSS gradients, glassmorphism, precise typography, and UI-style abstract shapes.

rules: Headings should use tracking-tighter for a modern tech feel.
Keep body text loose and legible (leading-relaxed).
Generous spacing: Use p-8 or p-12 in cards.
Containers with borders must have internal padding.
Implement the 'Tetris' bento grid pattern for feature layouts.

visual_enhancers.glows: Use absolute positioned divs with 'blur-[100px]' and brand colors (blue) to create subtle atmospheric lighting behind key elements like the hero text or features grid.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid 'border-white/5'. Use hover states to illuminate borders ('hover:border-blue-500/30').
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: For sticky nav and cards: 'backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-900/40 border border-white/10'. Add a subtle inner shadow if needed for depth.

components.name: Global Header
components.style: Fixed, sticky, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/50 border-b border-white/5).
components.content: Logo 'grndwork' on left. Navigation links in center. 'Join Early Access' CTA button on right.
components.interactions: Nav links should have a subtle hover effect.

components.name: Hero Section
components.style: Centered, high impact, heavy negative space. Heading text-5xl md:text-7xl tracking-tighter.
components.content: Headline: 'Discover your path. Land your future.' Subheadline: 'grndwork helps students go from not knowing what to pursue to landing real opportunities.'
components.visuals: Place a massive, extremely blurred soft blue orb in the background (z-[-1]).
components.ctas: Primary: 'Join Early Access' (White bg, black text, bold). Secondary: 'Learn More' (Outline, subtle hover).

components.name: Problem Statement Section
components.style: Minimalistic typography focus. Center-aligned or heavily asymmetric. Large text.
components.content: Statement: 'Most students don't lack ambition — they lack clarity.' Followed by muted supporting text about the confusion of career paths.

components.name: Features Grid
components.style: Bento box grid style. Dark transparent cards with glowing borders on hover.
components.card_ui: Use Lucide React icons. Soft gradient icon backgrounds. Minimal text descriptions.

components.name: How It Works (Timeline)
components.style: 3-step progression flow. Can be horizontal cards or a vertical connected timeline.

components.name: Vision / Social Proof
components.style: A large, bold quote block or vision statement emphasizing building what students actually need.
components.visuals: Use a subtle text gradient (from-white to-slate-500).

components.name: Waitlist Form CTA
components.style: Contained in a sleek dark card with a soft glowing blue border.
components.content: Headline: 'Get early access'. Subtext: 'Be one of the first students to try grndwork'.
components.form_fields: Name, Email, School, Graduation Year (select/dropdown), Career interest fields (multi-select or text).
components.logic: Use Shadcn Form + React Hook Form + Zod. Show Sonner toast on success.

accessibility_and_testing.testing: MANDATORY: Add data-testid attributes to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, selects, form submit buttons, toast notifications).

image_urls.description: Optional dark blue/black abstract gradient. Apply low opacity (10-20%) and use as a subtle background texture if pure CSS glow is not enough. Otherwise rely on CSS gradients.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'framer-motion' via yarn for scroll and entrance animations. Wrap sections in motion.div for fade-up effects.
Import Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' in the main HTML/CSS.
Configure tailwind.config.js to include font families and brand colors.
Do NOT use stock photos. Build the UI visuals entirely out of CSS shapes, gradients, and icons to maintain the early-stage tech startup look.
For the waitlist form, strictly use Shadcn components (Form, Input, Select, Button, Toast/Sonner).
